app.connectFailedDesc: Cannot connect to the backend service. Please make sure Node.js is installed.

chat.deleteConversationConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this conversation?

agents.title: Experts
agents.deleteConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to delete the expert "{{name}}"? All conversation history will also be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
agents.noAgentsHint: Once you create an agent in the Experts center, you can manage its security settings here.

settings.title: Settings
settings.enforcedTooltip: This setting is managed by the IT administrator
settings.envDesc: Skills and tools read these via process.env
settings.envEmptyHint: Click "Add" or pick a preset below to configure quickly
settings.evolverTriggered: Evolver triggered (running asynchronously, see Evolution log)
settings.abEvaluatorResult: Evaluated: scanned {{scanned}} · promoted {{promoted}} · rolled back {{rolledBack}} · inconclusive {{inconclusive}} · continued {{continued}}
settings.languageDesc: Language used by the agent in responses
settings.uiLanguageDesc: Language displayed in the desktop application
settings.evolverDesc: Automatically tune skills with high failure rates on a schedule (auditable + revertible)
settings.evolverEnabledHint: When off, the cron will not make any decisions (inline review uses a separate toggle)
settings.evolverCronHint: Standard 5-segment cron expression, checked every minute. e.g. 0 3 * * * = daily at 03:00
settings.evolverModeCanary: canary — gradual rollout (only N% of traffic on new version)
settings.evolverModeHintDryRun: dryRun decisions only write to the audit log; you must manually apply / reject in the Evolution Log tab (mutually exclusive with A-B)
settings.evolverModeHintCanary: canary decisions take effect immediately and start A-B, but only {{percent}}% of traffic reads the new version (90/10 default)
settings.evolverModeHintApply: apply takes effect immediately; dryRun waits for review; canary rolls out gradually to N% of traffic
settings.evolverCanaryRatioHint: Traffic share for the new version (5% ~ 50%, default 10%). Lower = lower risk but slower sample accumulation
settings.evolverMinEvidenceHint: How many usages a skill must accumulate before entering LLM decision (1~50)
settings.evolverSuccessRateHint: Only skills below this enter the candidate pool (0~1). e.g. 0.8 = trigger when failure rate > 20%
settings.evolverMaxCandidatesHint: Max skills evolved per cycle, hard cap 20
settings.evolverModelHint: Leave empty to use the ModelRouter default helper. Format: provider/modelId
settings.abSubtitle: After refine, start A/B buckets + statistical validation
settings.abEnableHintDryRun: In dryRun mode, no SKILL.md is written → cannot start A-B (auto-disabled)
settings.abEnableHintNormal: When off, refine takes effect directly without bucketing
settings.abMinCallsHint: A/B must each reach this count before statistical testing (5~1000, default 30)
settings.abMaxDaysHint: When exceeded, force-evaluate using existing data (1~365, default 7)
settings.abEvaluatorCronHint: Independent schedule, ideally staggered from evolver. e.g. 30 4 * * * = daily at 04:30
settings.abPromoteDeltaHint: Min success-rate gap B over A (and p<threshold) to promote (0~1, default 0.05)
settings.abRollbackDeltaHint: Min success-rate gap A over B (and p<threshold) to rollback (0~1, default 0.10)
settings.abDurationRatioHint: Force rollback when B's mean duration ≥ A × this ratio (1~10, default 1.5)
settings.curatorDesc: Cross-session umbrella consolidation + automatic stale/archive governance
settings.curatorEnabledHint: When off, the scheduler will not trigger automatically; the manual trigger button still works
settings.curatorArchivedHint: N days unused → physically archived (must be > stale threshold)
settings.curatorProtectHint: When on, built-in skills are never auto-archived (recommended on)
settings.policyDescPrefix: By "Source × Risk", decide how to handle skill installs:
settings.policyDescSuffix: . Click a cell to cycle through three states. Overrides have a blue ring; setting to the default value clears the override (saves storage + avoids false positives).
settings.policyResetConfirm: Clear all overrides and restore the default matrix?
settings.identityDesc: Bind the same employee's different IDs across Feishu / WeCom / WeChat to a single logical identity (e.g. 'self'), so the agent recognises them as one person across channels and merges preferences / role memory.
settings.identityIncomplete: Please fill in: identity + channel + ID
settings.identityUnbindConfirm:
Confirm unbind {{channel}}:{{peer}}?
Related memory will be re-isolated per channel.
settings.identityEmpty: No identity bindings yet. Agents are currently identifying employees per channel.

security.title: Security Center
security.desc: Manage agent permissions, audit logs and security policy
security.noPermissionHint: Permissions will appear here once an agent requests them
security.noAuditHint: Tool invocations by agents will be logged here
security.footer: Every action you take is under strict system protection

checkpoint.title: Undo Changes
checkpoint.desc: Agents automatically back up files before modifying or creating them. You can undo any change made in the last 7 days.
checkpoint.noCheckpointsHint: Files modified by agents will appear here
checkpoint.revertConfirmDesc: The following files will be restored or deleted
checkpoint.revertWarning: ⚠ This action is irreversible. Current file contents will be overwritten, and new files created by the agent will be deleted.

destructive.title: Confirm Action
destructive.subtitle: This action is irreversible
destructive.intro: About to execute an irreversible action:
destructive.warning: Once confirmed, the action runs immediately and cannot be undone.

permission.title: Permission Request
permission.permanentHint: After granting, this expert will keep this permission permanently. You can revoke it anytime from the Security Center.
permission.smartReview: AI Risk Assessment · Manual review suggested

setup.welcomeIntro: A self-evolving AI companion desktop app. Create AI agents with their own personality, memory, and permissions to collaborate and grow with you.
setup.welcomeCta: First, configure an LLM Provider so your agent can think and remember.
setup.providerIntro: Pick an LLM Provider and enter the API Key
setup.embeddingIntro: Embedding models power memory semantic search and knowledge-base retrieval, significantly improving agent recall.
setup.doneIntro: {{brand}} is ready. Start your AI companion journey!

expertSettings.settingsWorkspaceFilesDesc: Define the expert's personality, behaviour, and capabilities
